global.description: The ad features a vibrant teal background with a prominent logo and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale on bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A smooth, solid teal background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'ZenDrop' in a modern, sans-serif font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Two mirrors icon
elements.description: A simple line drawing of two mirrors facing each other, centered in the ad, symbolizing reflection or choice.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A minimalist design element that complements the mirrors, adding visual interest without being distracting.

elements.label: Flash sale message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now' is centered, conveying urgency and excitement.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Watch now' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A subtle design element that enhances the overall aesthetic without drawing attention away from the main message.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and minimalistic, flash sale, ZenDrop logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now, ZenDrop, Watch now, SALE
